titleStmt.title: SII 24.429: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 429. (A.R. No. 26 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of village Naṉṉūr in Teṉkarai-Rājagambhīra-vaḷanāḍu as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam by Aḍaippattu Siṟu-Mallappa-Nāyakkar, to four Brāhmaṇas in return for their services of preparing garlands to god Raṅganātha and daily offerings, a share of which is to be spent in feeding Śrīvaishṇavas at Rāmānujakūṭa of the donor. Dhaṉmapuri Raṅgayyar is stated to be in charge of this feeding. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1459, Hēviḷambi, Āḍi 5 correspond to 1537 A.D., July 4, but are insufficient for being verified.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . śakāptam 1000 4 100 5 10 9 Itaṉ melac cellāniṉṟa heviḷampi varuṣam Āṭi mātam 5§ teṉkarai pāṇḍi
kulāśani vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟā vīti vaḷanāṭṭu viḻā nāṭṭu tiruvaraṅgan tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrīpaṇṭārattukku Aṭappattu ciṟu mallappa nāyakka reṉ poliyūṭṭu cilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . Eṉṉuṭaiya poliyūṭṭu Āka nāḷ toṟum Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa taḷikaikku Amutupaṭimutalāṉa campārattukku poliyūṭṭākac cetta tiruccirāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi ten
karai Irācakempīra vaḷaṉāṭṭil tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam Ākac cetta naṉṉūr grāmam Oṉṟukku nāṉku Ellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa nañcey puñcey Uḷpaṭṭa nilattil perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevaṟku nāḷ Oṉṟukku cāttiyaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa tirumaālai nālu Intat tirumālai nālum nāḷtoṟum kaṭṭi niṭṭum brāhmaṇar Ellam bhaṭṭan vāraṇaśi nāgābhaṭṭan nārasimhabhaṭṭan rāmābhaṭṭan Ivarkaḷ nālu
perum candrādityavaraiyum puttrapauttraparamparaiyāka perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar(ṟ) tirumālai kaṭṭi niṭṭukiṟa Ūḻiyattukku dānam Āka kuṭutta maṉai 1 kku Aṭi 4 10 Āka viṭṭa maṉai 4 Irājavibhāṭaṉāl nañcey rūpāy 1 li nikki niṉṟa nañcey puñceynilam Uḷḷatu perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrīpaṇṭārattile tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa māka candrādyivaraiyum Aṉupavittukkoṇṭu Inta grāmattil Utaiyattile perumāḷ
śrī raṅganāthadevar Amutu ceytaruḷukiṟa taḷikaikku viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu Ākak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa nāḷ Oṉṟukku taḷikai Oṉṟu Intat taḷikai Oṉṟum Eṉṉuṭaiya rāmānujak kūṭattile śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷ ĀmutuRead amutuceytaruḷumpaṭikku taṉmapuri Iraṅka yaraik kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭi Āle ĀcandrārkkastābhiRead stāyiyāka san=tānaparamparai Āka śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷ Amutu ceytaruḷappaṇṇi naṭatti varavum . Inta cilāśāsanam
Eḻutiṉamaikku koyil kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.429 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
